title: Variant Paintings
description: [Polytone required] Unique item textures for all paintings as of 1.21, including support for some popular mods!
body:
# Variant Paintings
## Description
Requires [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)! Simply adds unique painting icons via Polytone's [CIM](https://github.com/MehVahdJukaar/polytone/wiki/Custom-Item-Models-(CIM)) feature. Most of the Portfolio textures are made by Nive!

## Mod Support
Currently supports:
- Portfolio
- Supplementaries
- Buzzier Bees
- Upgrade Aquatic
- Neapolitan

![Requires Polytone!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6622dc493db6c5642f9ecef8e71003922a995757.webp)
